button.mess: ¿Esta seguro que quiere publicar el Organigrama?
button.name: PUBLIC
button.label: Publicar

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Organigramas.ORGANIGRAMA.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Organigramas.ORGANIGRAMA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS.oi_organigrama) as CNT from WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS.oi_organigrama={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS.d_organigrama,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS.c_organigrama,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_organigrama as oi_organigrama, T.c_organigrama as c_organigrama, T.d_organigrama as d_organigrama, T.e_version as e_version, T.e_version_pub as e_version_pub FROM WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as T WHERE T.oi_organigrama in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
ESTR-FIND
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT ESTR.oi_estructura, ESTR.oi_organigrama, ESTR.c_estr_padre FROM WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as ESTR WHERE ESTR.oi_estructura={$SOURCE/@oi_estructura} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ESTR-FIND-PARENT
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT ESTR.oi_estructura, ESTR.oi_organigrama, ESTR.c_role, ESTR.c_estr_padre FROM WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as ESTR WHERE ESTR.oi_organigrama={$SOURCE/@oi_organigrama} and ESTR.c_estructura={$SOURCE/@c_estr_padre} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ESTRUCTURAS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT ESTR.oi_estructura, ESTR.c_estructura, ESTR.d_estructura, ESTR.c_role, ESTR.l_inicia, ESTR.c_estr_padre, ESTR.e_orden FROM WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as ESTR WHERE ESTR.oi_organigrama={$SOURCE/@oi_organigrama} and
{%?($SOURCE/@c_estr_padre='') {% (ESTR.c_estr_padre=\'\' or isNull(ESTR.c_estr_padre)) %} {% ESTR.c_estr_padre={$SOURCE/@c_estr_padre} %} %} ORDER BY e_orden ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT T.oi_instance, T.oi_thread, T.e_org_version FROM wrk02_threads as T, wrk02_instances as I, wrk01_wf as W, wrk05_organigramas as O JOIN T.oi_instance INNER I.oi_instance, W.oi_wf INNER I.oi_wf, O.oi_organigrama INNER W.oi_organigrama WHERE T.c_estado=\'WP\' and O.c_organigrama={$PARAM/@c_organigrama} and (isNull(T.e_org_version) or T.e_org_version!={Number($PARAM/@e_version)} ) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Organigramas.ROLE.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Organigramas.ROLE.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK05_ROLES.oi_role) as CNT from WRK05_ROLES Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK05_ROLES.oi_role={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK05_ROLES.d_role,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK05_ROLES.c_role,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK05_ROLES.oi_organigrama={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select T.oi_role as oi_role, T.c_role as c_role, T.d_role as d_role, T.d_color as d_color, T.l_unique as l_unique, T.oi_organigrama as oi_organigrama, P.c_organigrama as c_organigrama, P.d_organigrama as d_organigrama from WRK05_ROLES as T, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as P join T.oi_organigrama inner P.oi_organigrama WHERE T.oi_role in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Organigramas.ESTRUCTURA.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Organigramas.ESTRUCTURA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK05_ESTRUCTURA.oi_estructura) as CNT from WRK05_ESTRUCTURA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK05_ESTRUCTURA.oi_estructura={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK05_ESTRUCTURA.d_estructura,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK05_ESTRUCTURA.c_estructura,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK05_ESTRUCTURA.oi_organigrama={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select T.oi_estructura as oi_estructura, T.c_estructura as c_estructura, T.d_estructura as d_estructura, T.oi_organigrama as oi_organigrama, P.c_organigrama as c_organigrama, P.d_organigrama as d_organigrama, R.c_role as c_role, R.d_role as d_role from WRK05_ESTRUCTURA as T, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as P, WRK05_ROLES as R join P.oi_organigrama inner T.oi_organigrama, P.oi_organigrama inner R.oi_organigrama, T.c_role inner R.c_role WHERE T.oi_estructura in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_count
qry_father
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Organigramas.ENTIDAD_ESTR.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Organigramas.ENTIDAD_ESTR.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR.oi_entidad_estr) as CNT from WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR.oi_entidad_estr={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR.d_entidad_estr,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR.oi_entidad_estr,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR.oi_estructura={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select T.oi_entidad_estr as oi_entidad_estr, T.oi_entidad as oi_entidad, T.d_entidad_estr as d_entidad_estr from WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR as T WHERE T.oi_entidad_estr in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in split('1;{%=$PARAM/@IDS %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1_AUX
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select T.oi_entidad as oi_entidad, T.d_entidad_estr as d_entidad_estr from WRK05_ENTIDAD_ESTR as T WHERE T.oi_entidad = {$PARAM/@value} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Organigramas.ESTR_RAMA.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Organigramas.ESTR_RAMA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK05_ESTR_ESTR.oi_estr_rama) as CNT from WRK05_ESTR_ESTR Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK05_ESTR_ESTR.oi_estr_rama={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK05_ESTR_ESTR.c_estructura,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK05_ESTR_ESTR.c_estructura,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK05_ESTR_ESTR.oi_estructura={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
